calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Jew for administrator Shahid Nakhoda (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

Mr. Jew described difficulty obtaining a disclaimer from the decedent's mother and uncertainty regarding the existence of a will. He reported that despite repeated attempts, no signed will had been produced, and the matter proceeded on intestate succession.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant in part. The request to waive bond was denied, as good cause findings are required, and a beneficiary waiver does not suffice. The Court advised that petitioner may proceed without posting bond at this time but must file an ex parte petition to fix bond once estate assets are identified.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Sep-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
